title: Settings
downloadQualityDescription: Choose how new M4A / AAC downloads are stored.
downloadQualityWarning: Downloads the highest available compatible audio quality instead of converting it to 96 kbps. This uses significantly more storage.
frequencyDescription: Base tuning frequency for pitch shifting. Default is 432 Hz.
frequencyUnsupportedIos: Pitch shifting isn't available in this iPhone build.
eqDescription: Adjust frequency bands to shape your sound
eqUnsupportedIos: Equalizer isn't available in this iPhone build.
loudnessDescription: Automatically even out track loudness when loudness data is available
loudnessUnsupportedIos: Local loudness analysis isn't available in this iPhone build.
loudnessIosBoostNotice: Positive loudness boost isn't available in this iPhone build.
spotifyDescription: Connect your Spotify account to search its catalog
spotifyHelpStep5: Copy Client ID and Client Secret.
cloudDescription: Sync canonical tracks, playlists, their order, and loudness metadata without duplicate audio files.
cloudAutoSyncEnabledDescription: Auto Sync is enabled by default and continuously syncs changes between devices. While TON is open, it checks for changes every 10 seconds; in the background, synchronization is scheduled by the system. If an error occurs, use the manual buttons below.
cloudAutoSyncDisabledDescription: Auto Sync is disabled. Synchronization runs only when you use the manual buttons below.
cloudAutoSyncDetails: Pending: {{pendingChanges}} · Waiting for Wi-Fi: {{pendingDownloads}} · Last sync: {{lastSuccess}} · Next retry: {{nextRetry}}
cloudStorageErrorAccessDenied: The R2 token cannot access this bucket. In Cloudflare, give the token Object Read & Write for this bucket, then Save & Test.
cloudStorageErrorBadRequest: The R2 request is invalid. Check Account ID, Bucket, Access Key ID, Secret Access Key, and Jurisdiction.
cloudStorageErrorBucketNotFound: Bucket not found. Check the exact bucket name and Account ID.
cloudStorageErrorClockSkew: Cloudflare rejected the request because the device time is wrong. Enable automatic date and time.
cloudStorageErrorConnectionFailed: R2 connection failed. Check your internet connection and R2 settings, then Save & Test.
cloudStorageErrorInvalidAccessKey: Access Key ID does not exist or belongs to a different Cloudflare account. Create a new R2 API token and copy Access Key ID from the token result.
cloudStorageErrorJurisdiction: The R2 endpoint does not match this bucket. Keep Jurisdiction as Default for a normal bucket; use EU/FedRAMP only for buckets created there.
cloudStorageErrorSecureStorageUnavailabl: TON cannot store the R2 secret securely on this device. Restart the app and try Save & Test again.
cloudStorageErrorSignatureMismatch: Cloudflare rejected the request signature. Check Account ID, Bucket, Access Key ID, Secret Access Key, and Jurisdiction. Paste the Secret again if it was copied with a space or newline.
cloudHelpStep1: Bucket: in the left menu click Storage & databases -> R2 Object Storage -> Overview.
cloudHelpStep2: Click your bucket. Copy the bucket name shown at the top of that page into TON Bucket.
cloudHelpStep3: Account ID: click Account home. On your account row, click the three-dot menu and choose Copy account ID.
cloudHelpStep4: If you do not see that menu: Account home -> Overview, scroll down to the API section, then copy Account ID.
cloudHelpStep5: If it is still missing: Workers & Pages -> Overview -> Account details -> Click to copy.
cloudHelpStep6: Access keys: click Storage & databases -> R2 Object Storage -> Overview. Do not use the bucket Objects tab.
cloudHelpStep7: In API Tokens, click Manage, then Create API token.
cloudHelpStep8: Choose Object Read & Write. For bucket scope, select the same bucket you put into TON.
cloudHelpStep9: After creating the token, copy Access Key ID into TON Access Key ID and Secret Access Key into TON Secret Access Key. The secret is shown only once.
cloudHelpStep10: Leave Jurisdiction as Default unless you created the bucket in EU/FedRAMP. Keep Prefix as ton on every device, then Save & Test.
exportLibraryShareSheetToast: Bundle with {{tracks}} tracks and {{playlists}} playlists is ready. The iOS share sheet was opened.
importInvalidBundleToast: Selected file isn't a TON export bundle
aboutAudioFormat: Download format: AAC-LC in M4A on every platform
aboutDesktopOnly: SoundCloud is currently a desktop-only feature
upToDateToast: You're already on the latest version
updateInstallerOpenedToast: Update downloaded. Android installer was opened.
updateSimulationToast: Simulation ready. TON created a downloaded update placeholder.
communityDescription: Found a bug or have an idea for a feature? Join the Discord and tell us.
